heading: Payment to Trust Fund; Board requests binding on Secretary
label: 2009b Payment to Trust Fund; Board requests binding on Secretary
text: For payment to the Harry S Truman Scholarship Foundation Trust Fund, established by , $500,000, to remain available until expended: , That on or after , all requests of the Board of Trustees to the Secretary of the Treasury provided for in this section shall be binding on the Secretary, including requests for the issuance at par of special obligations exclusively to the fund as provided for in , which the Secretary shall implement without regard to the determination related to the public interest required by the last sentence of that section.section 2009 of this titlesection 2009(b) of this titleProvidedMarch 11, 2009
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Financial Services and General Government Appropriations Act, 2009, and also as part of the Omnibus Appropriations Act, 2009, and not as part of the Harry S Truman Memorial Scholarship Act which comprises this chapter.
